appShell.title: AppShell
appShell.description: Application frame: topbar + sidebar + main content with automatic mobile drawer. Supports standard, rail (icon-only) and dual (rail + panel) variants.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Topbar + sidebar + content — the most common layout.

rail.title: Rail variant
rail.desc: Persistent icon-only rail, ideal for dense apps.

collapsed.title: Collapsed sidebar
collapsed.desc: v-model:collapsed lets you fold the sidebar while keeping icons.

noSidebar.title: No sidebar
noSidebar.desc: Topbar-only layout — useful for landings or linear flows.

topbarSpan.title: Sidebar-first layout
topbarSpan.desc: Use topbar-span='content' for the Linear/Notion pattern where the sidebar extends full height and the topbar only covers the main content column.

content.main: Main shell content — this region is the default slot.

props.collapsedWidth: Width of the collapsed sidebar (standard variant).
props.breakpoint: Breakpoint at which the sidebar becomes permanent.
props.stickySidebar: Makes the sidebar sticky on desktop.
props.topbarSpan: Controls how far the topbar spans. 'full' = topbar covers entire width (default). 'content' = sidebar extends full height, topbar only covers the main content column (Linear/Notion layout).

slots.sidebar: Sidebar in standard and dual variants (secondary panel).

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name for the application shell
a11y.focusNative: Focus is managed by the shell; use Tab to navigate regions and interactive elements

canvas.title: Canvas
canvas.description: Surface with decorative pattern (dots, grid or lines). Useful for workspaces, drop zones or hero sections that hint at a workspace.

intensity.title: Intensity
intensity.desc: Controls the pattern opacity over the surface.

bordered.title: Bordered + cellSize
bordered.desc: Combine a larger cellSize and border for wide workspace areas.

props.surface: Surface token used for the base background.
props.radius: Corner radius. Inherits from the ModoProvider.
props.bordered: Adds a 1px border using the border token.

slots.default: Content rendered on top of the pattern.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name for the canvas
a11y.focusNative: Non-interactive element; does not participate in the tab order

container.title: Container
container.description: Centered wrapper with max-width and semantic padding to constrain content width at any breakpoint.
container.overviewSample: Content limited to the max width

sizes.title: Sizes
sizes.desc: Each preset matches a common breakpoint for readable content.

fluid.title: Fluid
fluid.desc: Without a max-width, the container fills all available space.

padding.title: Padding
padding.desc: Control inner spacing with system tokens.

container.fluidSample: Fills the full available width with generous padding.

props.padding: Horizontal and vertical padding applied to the container.
props.centered: Centers the container horizontally with auto margins.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name for the container
a11y.focusNative: Non-interactive element; does not participate in the tab order

divider.title: Divider
divider.description: Horizontal or vertical separator line, optionally with a centered label or icon.

orientations.title: Orientations
orientations.desc: Horizontal by default; vertical when the host is flex/grid.

label.title: With label and icon
label.desc: Insert a centered label or icon (horizontal only).

variants.title: Line variants
variants.desc: Solid, dashed and dotted for different hierarchy levels.

emphasis.title: Emphasis
emphasis.desc: Controls the line contrast against the background.

props.label: Inline label (horizontal orientation only).
props.icon: Optional icon next to the label.
props.labelAlign: Position of the label inside the divider.
props.decorative: If decorative, it's ignored by assistive tech.

slots.default: Inline content alternative to the label prop.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name for the divider
a11y.focusNative: Decorative separator; does not participate in the tab order

hstack.title: HStack
hstack.description: Stack shortcut with horizontal direction. Useful to line up items in a row with consistent spacing and alignment.

spacings.title: Spacings
spacings.desc: System tokens: xsmall, small, medium, large.

alignments.title: Alignments
alignments.desc: Combine justify and align for different layouts.

wrapping.title: Wrapping
wrapping.desc: Enable wrap so children break when there's no space.

props.wrap: Line-break behavior when there's no space.
props.divider: Inserts a vertical Divider between each child.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name for the horizontal stack
a11y.focusNative: Non-interactive layout element; does not participate in the tab order

pageHeader.title: PageHeader
pageHeader.description: Page header with title, subtitle, optional back button, breadcrumbs, tabs and an actions area.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Title, subtitle and divider — the most common combination.

breadcrumbs.title: With breadcrumbs
breadcrumbs.desc: Use the breadcrumbs slot to show the navigation hierarchy.

tabs.title: With tabs
tabs.desc: Tabs align with the divider for a smooth visual transition.

actions.title: With back & actions
actions.desc: Typical combo for detail or edit views.

props.title: Main page title.
props.subtitle: Secondary text below the title.
props.backButton: Shows a back button to the left of the title.
props.backIcon: Back button icon. Defaults to chevron-left.
props.backAriaLabel: Accessible name for the icon-only back button.
props.divider: Renders a bottom border separating the header from content.
props.sticky: Enables position: sticky at the top of scroll.

slots.title: Replaces the plain title with rich content.
slots.subtitle: Replaces the plain subtitle with rich content.
slots.actions: Actions on the right side of the header (buttons, menus).
slots.hero: Highlighted area (banner, metrics) below the main header.
slots.tabs: Tabs rendered below the header, aligned with the divider.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name for the page header
a11y.focusNative: Focus is managed by interactive elements inside the header (back button, actions)

popoverPanel.title: PopoverPanel
popoverPanel.description: Internal primitive used by floating components (Select, MultiSelect, DropdownMenu, Tooltip, DateField, Combobox…). Renders a panel teleported to body while preserving the provider's theme and palette.

tooltip.title: Tooltip
tooltip.desc: Tooltip uses its own positioning system, similar to PopoverPanel.

select.title: Select
select.desc: The Select dropdown renders inside a PopoverPanel.

direct.title: Direct usage
direct.desc: Combine usePopover (open, panelStyle, panelRef) with PopoverPanel for cases not covered by high-level components.

demo.tooltipText: I'm a popover anchored to the trigger
demo.directNote: For common cases (menus, selects, tooltips) use the high-level components that already integrate

props.radius: Corner radius. Inherits from the provider when not set.
props.role: ARIA role applied to the panel.
props.labelledBy: Id of the element that labels the panel.

emits.updatePanelRef: Emitted when the root element changes. Required so usePopover can position it.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element within the panel
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element within the panel
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name for the popover panel
a11y.focusNative: Focus is trapped inside the popover while open; use Escape to close

sidebar.title: Sidebar
sidebar.description: Side navigation with sections, items, icons and badges. Supports collapsed mode (icon-only), nested items and different active styles.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Flat list of items with controlled active state.

collapsed.title: Collapsed (rail)
collapsed.desc: Icon-only mode with automatic tooltips on hover.

sections.title: With sections
sections.desc: Group items under titles for better organization.

footer.title: With footer
footer.desc: Footer slot for logout or profile buttons.

toggle.title: With toggle button
toggle.desc: Add show-toggle to render a built-in collapse button. Use v-model:collapsed with useLocalStorage to persist the state.

props.sections: Sections to render (each with title and items).
props.items: Shortcut: flat item list rendered as an anonymous section.
props.collapsed: Icon-only mode: hides labels, badges and sub-items.
props.activeVariant: How the active state is rendered.
props.dividers: Renders borders between header / body / footer.
props.showToggle: Renders a built-in circular chevron button at the sidebar edge that toggles collapsed. Positioned absolute, overflows the container by 12 px.
props.toggleSide: Which edge the toggle button appears on. 'end' (default) for left-side sidebars, 'start' for right-side sidebars.

emits.select: Emitted when an item is activated.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name for the sidebar navigation
a11y.focusNative: Focus is managed by interactive items inside the sidebar

stack.title: Stack
stack.description: Generic flex primitive to stack children in row or column with consistent spacing, alignment and wrap. HStack and VStack are shortcuts.

vertical.title: Vertical (default)
vertical.desc: Stacks children in a column with system spacing.

horizontal.title: Horizontal
horizontal.desc: Switch direction to row for a horizontal layout.

wrapping.title: Wrapping
wrapping.desc: Lets children jump to the next line when there's no space.

props.divider: Inserts a Divider between each child.
props.fullWidth: Makes the stack take full available width.
props.fullHeight: Makes the stack take full available height.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name for the stack
a11y.focusNative: Non-interactive layout element; does not participate in the tab order

topbar.title: Topbar
topbar.description: Application top bar with logo, title, subtitle, nav, search, actions and user slots. Designed to be used inside AppShell or standalone.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Logo and title — the simplest version.

search.title: With search
search.desc: Centered SearchInput with a user Avatar.

actions.title: Actions & user
actions.desc: Typical combo for an authenticated app.

transparent.title: No divider
transparent.desc: No bottom border — useful for integrating with a hero or canvas.

props.title: Visible title next to the logo.
props.subtitle: Secondary text below the title.
props.sticky: Enables position: sticky with translucent background.
props.menuToggle: Shows a hamburger button on the left.
props.menuAriaLabel: Accessible name for the icon-only menu button.

emits.menuToggle: Emitted when the menu button is clicked.

slots.logo: Logo or brand at the start of the bar.
slots.title: Replaces the plain title with rich content.
slots.subtitle: Replaces the plain subtitle with rich content.
slots.user: Avatar / user menu at the end.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name for the top bar
a11y.focusNative: Focus is managed by interactive elements inside the topbar (menu, actions, search)

vstack.title: VStack
vstack.description: Stack shortcut with vertical direction. Stacks children in a column with consistent spacing and alignment.

basic.title: Basic
basic.desc: Stacks children vertically with system spacing.

spacings.title: Spacings
spacings.desc: Pick the vertical gap based on the desired density.

divider.title: With divider
divider.desc: Inserts horizontal separators between each element.

props.divider: Inserts a horizontal Divider between each child.

a11y.kbTab: Move focus to the next focusable element
a11y.kbShiftTab: Move focus to the previous focusable element
a11y.ariaLabel: Provides an accessible name for the vertical stack
a11y.focusNative: Non-interactive layout element; does not participate in the tab order
